positive: A vibrant retro-futuristic vaporwave portrait of a stylized dolphin leaping over a grid-lined sunset horizon. Neon pink, electric cyan, and deep purple color scheme. Synthwave aesthetic, 1980s vaporwave art, halftone dot texture, digital illustration, highly saturated.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
